title: enneastemon fornicatus
intro: Enneastemon fornicatus, also known as the false orris, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Enneastemon fornicatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Enneastemon fornicatus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, roots, and stems are commonly used in herbal remedies.
